name: Italian Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the shortening.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
3. Add the sugar, cocoa, cold coffee, cinnamon, chopped nuts, raisins (if using), vanilla, and melted shortening to the dry ingredients. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
6. Frost, if desired.
Makes about 90 cookies; 20 per lb., frosted.
NOTE: Increase flour to 6 cups for a double batch.
